test_summary: P0 bug fixes + P1 features (custom commissions, INR currency)

tests.name: GET /api/tickets/my-tickets - returns tickets with created_by_name, created_by_role
GET /api/tickets/{id} - detail returns created_by_name, created_by_role, messages
GET /api/partner-commissions - returns all mappings with names
DELETE /api/partner-commissions - removes custom, falls back to default
POST /api/sales with currency=USD - converts 1000 USD to 83500 INR
Commission calculated on INR received amount
GET /api/settings/exchange-rate - returns INR base with multi-currency rates
Admin Dashboard - Commissions tab shows ₹ currency
Admin Dashboard - Custom Product Commissions section visible with form
Admin Dashboard - Existing custom commission (Partner User -> Canada PR: 15%) displayed
Client Dashboard - My Documents shows valid dates
Client Dashboard - Support tab shows tickets with names
